backend/main.mo: Motoko canister defining CMS content types, user profiles with access control, and functions for profile management and seeding initial content.
feature_evidence.json: Structured report listing feature requirements, related files, components, and test IDs used for tracking implementation evidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-style list summarizing frontend files and their responsibilities across UI sections, data, and layout.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining theme variables for light and dark modes and applying base styles.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML document mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component wiring routing, page rendering, global providers, background effects, and CMS/Calendar pages.
frontend/src/components/audio/Background: Auto-playing background audio manager handling chainsaw and clown laugh loops with gesture fallback logic.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: UI screen showing an access denied message for users lacking CMS permissions.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Provides a login/logout button using Internet Identity with loading states and error recovery.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Shows a modal prompting authenticated users without profiles to enter their name and saves it via an actor.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: Reusable layout component that renders a styled section with title, subtitle, icon, and content.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Renders the site footer with a hazard warning and attribution section.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Implements the sticky header with navigation, scroll handling, mobile menu logic, and site branding.
frontend/src/components/sections/auditio: Shows a grid of audition perks, each with an icon, title, and brief description.
frontend/src/components/sections/Auditio: Displays audition information, perks, dates, and roles within a styled section layout.
frontend/src/components/sections/ClownTo: Shows a scenic preview of the Clown Town interior with image, title, and descriptive text.
frontend/src/components/sections/FoodBoo: Lists food booths with images, pricing alerts, descriptions, and navigation to booth detail pages.
frontend/src/components/sections/Haunted: Displays a grid of haunted house cards with images, descriptions, scenes, wait-time info, and location details.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHer: Renders the homepage hero section with background video, logo, thematic text, and a button that scrolls to the auditions section.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomePro: Shows a featured procession event card with imagery and a detailed description of the nightly parade.
frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLoc: Provides operating hours, ticket options, and rules/warnings using styled cards and alerts.
frontend/src/components/sections/MerchSh: Lists merch shop cards with names, items, prices, and a closing note about merchandise.
frontend/src/components/sections/ScareZo: Displays scare zone cards with images, descriptions, and a special link for the Laser Hell zone.
frontend/src/components/sections/Schoolh: Shows three sneak‑peek attraction cards with images, short descriptions, and links to detailed views.
frontend/src/components/sections/Teaser2: Renders a 2027 teaser section showcasing two upcoming haunted houses with themed cards and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/TeaserS: Displays a simple teaser card announcing future content with a sparkles icon.
frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBack: Provides layered animated horror-themed background effects including fire, smoke, chainsaws, blood, and noise.
frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts: Defines detailed descriptions and menus for multiple themed food booths in the park.
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts: Maps content item names to their corresponding generated image asset paths.
frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts: Lists haunted houses with names, taglines, descriptions, and optional scenes plus location info.
frontend/src/content/merchShops.ts: Specifies available merchandise shops with items and pricing.
frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts: Describes the park’s scare zones, each with a name, tagline, and detailed horror-themed description.
frontend/src/content/schoolhouseSneakPee: Provides a detailed preview of the Schoolhouse haunted house with title, description, and image reference.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages a backend actor tied to user identity and handles related query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuthz.ts: React Query hooks for fetching caller role, admin status, and user profile via the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useContentItems.ts: Provides queries and mutations for fetching, creating, updating, deleting, and seeding content items through the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity provider and hook for managing identity, login, and state using Dfinity AuthClient.
React Query hooks to fetch and update the main haunt schedule, invalidating related caches on changes.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining theme variables, horror-themed styling, typography, and motion-reduction utilities.
frontend/src/lib/contentFormatting.ts: Utility functions for formatting content item fields, dates, types, and generating summary strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root application.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Calendar UI that displays and filters content items by date and type with detailed item dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/ClownTownSneakPeekPag: Page showing a detailed preview of the Clown Town haunted house with image, description, and navigation.
frontend/src/pages/CmsPage.tsx: Admin CMS page handling content items and schedule management with create, update, delete, and seed functionality.
frontend/src/pages/HellHoleSneakPeekPage: Displays a detailed sneak peek page for the 'Terror Hell hole' haunted house with image and description.
frontend/src/pages/LaserHellPage.tsx: Shows details for the 'Laser Hell' scare zone including its image, location, and description.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolhouseSneakPeekP: Renders a sneak peek page for the Schoolhouse attraction with image, title, and description.
frontend/src/pages/SharksHellPage.tsx: Displays details for the 'Sharks Hell' food booth including image, description, and a menu list.
frontend/src/pages/SliderDoomPage.tsx: Shows information for the 'Slider Doom' food booth with image, description, and menu items.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters for navigation state handling.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind config enabling dark mode, custom OKLCH color palette, extended shadows, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file defining CMS-driven haunt content, frontend/admin requirements, and feature request metadata for calendar and content management.
